name: Italo-Romance
notes: Classification-only clade node for the Italo-Romance branch. Carries no phonology: it is never a data-inheritance source, only a step in the ancestry chain from which `family` is derived. Glottolog has no node with exactly this membership; its nearest node is Italo-Dalmatian (ital1286).

sources.author: Hammarström, Harald; Forkel, Robert; Haspelmath, Martin; Bank, Sebastian
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
